slides.description: Overview of ITIL v3 continuity and availability management practices, service resilience, and governance responsibilities.

slides.description: Introductory deck on NoSQL concepts, MongoDB fundamentals, and the MEAN stack in practical web projects.

slides.description: Compact introduction to React components, JSX, and state for frontend teams starting with modern UI development.

slides.description: Practical walkthrough of server-state management with React Query, covering caching, loading flows, and mutations.

slides.description: Talk about integrating automated tests into delivery pipelines to raise confidence and shorten feedback loops.

slides.description: Primer on Flutter app development, widget composition, and cross-platform mobile delivery.

slides.description: Foundational explanation of RxJS observables, streams, and reactive patterns for frontend applications.

slides.description: Step-by-step notes on preparing, versioning, and publishing an internal NPM package in a team environment.

slides.title: Design Patterns
slides.description: Survey of classic design patterns and when to apply them to improve code structure and maintainability.

slides.description: Presentation introducing Ghost CMS, its publishing workflow, and where it fits in content-driven projects.

slides.description: Overview of continuous integration with Maven and Jenkins, from build automation to pipeline feedback.

slides.description: Seminar deck on combining ASP.NET Core, Angular, TypeScript, and Yeoman scaffolding in one development workflow.
